title: calycodendron fragrans
intro: Calycodendron fragrans, also known as the fragrant calycodendron, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Calycodendron fragrans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Calycodendron fragrans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
